error_signature: You don’t have permission to publish this workflow
title: Permission error when publishing workflows in Docker
symptom: Users encounter a message stating 'You don’t have permission to publish this workflow' when attempting to publish new workflows in n8n.
applies_when: Different versions of n8n image in main service and worker
not_this_if: Using the same version for both main service and worker
root_cause: The error occurs because the main n8n service and the worker are running different versions of the n8n image, leading to inconsistencies in permissions and functionality.
fix_steps: Ensure both the main n8n service and the worker are using the same version of the n8n image
Restart the Docker container after making changes
agent_instruction: Align the n8n image versions in the main service and worker, then restart the Docker container.
